preamble: The transformation of [ʌ] to the diphthong [iə] (or similar rising diphthongs) involves fronting and diphthongization processes. While this pathway is phonetically plausible in vowel chain shifts, documented real-world examples of this specific transition are sparse in the linguistic literature.

examples.note: Theoretical pathway of fronting and diphthongization; no currently documented instances in established sound change literature.
